[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001 3
1 0011100 3
2 0101000 2
3 1011011 5
4 0011000 2
5 1100001 3
6 0100011 3
7 0010111 4

01 10 0111111 6
12 21 0110000 2
23 32 0010000 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0100001 2
56 65 0000011 2
67 76 0000011 2
70 07 0101011 4

02 20 0110000 2
13 31 0011000 2 match 4
24 42 1100000 2
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0000001 1
57 75 0100011 3 match 6
60 06 0010111 4 match 7
71 17 0101011 4

03 30 0011000 2 match 4
14 41 0100001 2
25 52 0100000 1
36 63 0010000 1
47 74 0100001 2
50 05 0100011 3 match 6
61 16 0010111 4 match 7
72 27 0100000 1

04 40 0100001 2
15 51 0100011 3 match 6
26 62 0010000 1
37 73 0001000 1
